description: Sistema de facturación electrónica SaaS para Perú (SUNAT). Multi-tenant con roles (admin, emisor). Emite facturas, boletas, notas de crédito/débito, guías de remisión, retenciones, percepciones. Panel backoffice para superadmin.

requirements.title: Authentication & Authorization
requirements.description: Login with tenantId + email + password. JWT tokens. Role-based access (admin, emisor). Redirect to /login when unauthenticated. Backoffice separate login.

requirements.title: Dashboard
requirements.description: KPI cards showing document counts, revenue, charts. Loads after login.

requirements.title: Document Management
requirements.description: List documents with filters. Emit new factura/boleta/nota. View document details.

requirements.title: Despatch Advices
requirements.description: Guías de remisión - list and create.

requirements.title: Customer Management
requirements.description: CRUD for customers (RUC, DNI). Search functionality.

requirements.title: Series Management
requirements.description: Configure document series (F001, B001, etc). Activate/deactivate.

requirements.title: Voided Documents
requirements.description: Comunicaciones de baja - void emitted documents.

requirements.title: Administration
requirements.description: User management, API keys, webhooks, settings, reports, audit log.

requirements.title: Reference Data
requirements.description: SUNAT catalogs, exchange rates, plan info, certificates.

requirements.title: Navigation & UX
requirements.description: Sidebar navigation, logout flow, responsive design.

requirements.title: Backoffice Panel
requirements.description: Superadmin panel - login, dashboard, tenant management, documents, employees.
